Code fragment: .selectFrom(ORGANIZATION)
Explanation: Using selectFrom(ORGANIZATION) fetches all columns from the ORGANIZATION table, which may retrieve unnecessary data and reduce query performance. Consider using an explicit select() with only the columns needed for the Organization class mapping.

Code fragment: dsl.selectFrom(USER)
Explanation: Using selectFrom(USER) fetches all columns from the USER table, which retrieves unnecessary data and impacts performance. Replace with an explicit column selection like dsl.select(USER.ID_MAX, USER.NAME, ...).from(USER) to fetch only the required fields.
